interactionPlan.concept: Understanding the derivative of the coordinate Y along an edge in 3D space with its tangent and occlusion implications.

interactions.label: Rotate Edge
interactions.teaches: Shows change in the tangent vector direction and its effect on the derivative.

interactions.label: Adjust Theta
interactions.teaches: Demonstrates how the angle theta affects the derivative ∂Y/∂y = 1/cos(θ).

interactions.label: Show Occlusion Edge
interactions.teaches: Explains special handling when edges coincide with occlusion boundaries.

interactions.label: Show Derivative Components
interactions.teaches: Illustrates calculation via ∇Y · t and its components -n_y ∂Y/∂x + n_x ∂Y/∂y.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial view aligned with the edge and normal vector, highlighting the tangent vector.
interactionPlan.notes: Focus on visualizing changes to derivatives with interaction; ensure clarity in occlusion edge toggle.

gpt-4o.notes: The representation is accurate, with interactive features enhancing concept understanding, though some spatial alignment is slightly off.
